---

# Glossary

Define each term once. All other docs link here instead of redefining.

---

## Entities

**Issue** — The core domain object representing a reported city infrastructure problem. Fields: `id`, `type`, `description`, `location`, `severity`, `status`, `reportedAt`. Source: `src/types/index.ts:19`

**NewIssue** — Input shape for creating an issue. Omits `id`, `status`, and `reportedAt` (all auto-generated). Source: `src/types/index.ts:29`

**Location** — Geographic point with `lat: number`, `lng: number`, and optional `address?: string`. Source: `src/types/index.ts:13`

---

## Enums

### IssueType
Values: `"pothole"` | `"broken_streetlight"` | `"graffiti"` | `"illegal_dumping"` | `"damaged_sign"` | `"other"`. Source: `src/types/index.ts:1`

### Severity
Urgency of an issue. Values (ascending): `"low"` | `"medium"` | `"high"` | `"critical"`. Source: `src/types/index.ts:9`

### Status
Lifecycle stage of an issue. Values: `"reported"` | `"in_progress"` | `"resolved"` | `"closed"`. Source: `src/types/index.ts:11`

---

## ID Format

**Issue ID** — Auto-generated string following pattern `ISS-YYYY-###` where `YYYY` = current year and `###` = zero-padded sequential integer (e.g. `ISS-2025-007`). Counter resets each calendar year. Generated by `generateIssueIdFromState()`. Source: `src/store/slices/issuesSlice.ts:18`

---

## Constants

**DEFAULT_MAP_CENTER** — `{ lat: 34.0209, lng: -6.8416 }` — Rabat, Morocco. Used as initial viewport for all maps. Source: `src/data/constants.ts:50`

**DEFAULT_MAP_ZOOM** — `13`. Default Leaflet zoom level. Source: `src/data/constants.ts:55`

**STATUS_COLORS** — `Record<Status, string>` Tailwind class strings for status badges. Source: `src/data/constants.ts:26`

**SEVERITY_COLORS** — `Record<Severity, string>` Tailwind class strings for severity badges. Source: `src/data/constants.ts:33`

**ISSUE_TYPE_COLORS** — `Record<IssueType, string>` Tailwind class strings for type badges. Source: `src/data/constants.ts:40`

---

## Persistence

**city-issues-db** — IndexedDB database name. Version 1. Single object store `issues` keyed by `id`. Source: `src/db/indexedDb.ts:5`

**Mock data** — Five seed issues auto-loaded into IndexedDB on first launch if the store is empty. Source: `src/data/mockData.ts`

---

## Redux State Shape

**IssuesState** — `{ issues: Issue[]; isLoading: boolean }`. `issues` sorted newest-first by `reportedAt`. Source: `src/store/slices/issuesSlice.ts:7`

**FilterParams** — `{ searchText?: string; types?: IssueType[]; statuses?: Status[]; severities?: Severity[] }`. Derived from URL search params, never persisted to Redux. Source: `src/store/selectors/issuesSelectors.ts:6`

---

## Components

**InteractiveMap** — Leaflet map component allowing user to click to select a `Location`. Used in `IssueForm`. Source: `src/components/issues/IssueMap.tsx:33`

**StaticMap** — Non-interactive Leaflet map displaying a fixed `Location` with a marker. Used in `IssueDetails`. Source: `src/components/issues/IssueMap.tsx:100`

**FilterBar** — Controls (search input + three multi-select dropdowns) that read/write URL search params. Source: `src/components/issues/FilterBar.tsx`

**StatusBadge / SeverityBadge / TypeBadge** — Colored pill badges. Source: `src/components/issues/StatusBadge.tsx`

**IssueCard** — Clickable list row showing truncated issue info. Source: `src/components/issues/IssueCard.tsx`
